heading: Traralgon East vs Traralgon South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Traralgon East, Victoria and Traralgon South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Traralgon South has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Traralgon East (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Traralgon East or Traralgon South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Traralgon East has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Traralgon South scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Traralgon East scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Traralgon South scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Traralgon East or Traralgon South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Traralgon South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
